stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM, is it possible to fly from EUAD on the 1st March?

Q EGTT/QAZCD/IV/NBO/AE/000/022/5456N00249W002 A EUAD B FROM: 16/02/04 09:00C TO: 16/03/05 18:00 E AERODROME ATZ DEACTIVATED. ATS NOT AVBL. AD NOT AVBL TO ACFT EXCEPT WITH OUT OF HOURS PERMISSION. IAP NOT AVBL

options.a: Yes, if permission is obtained to fly out of hours.
options.b: Yes, Commercial Air Transport flights are insured for such situations.
options.c: No, the airfield is out of commission between the 4th of February and the 5th of March.
options.d: No, the trip must be delayed until after 18:00 on the 5th March.
